## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss sales pipeline, HubSpot integration, and team coordination for upcoming week.](https://fathom.video/share/MsHfUaZMzxvajpg2N1tq1EjMQYncwk-H?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New HubSpot expert (Kyle B.) to replace Joe, starting tomorrow with 3-day overlap](https://fathom.video/share/MsHfUaZMzxvajpg2N1tq1EjMQYncwk-H?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [Tyler's schedule for next week finalized, balancing calls and time with Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/MsHfUaZMzxvajpg2N1tq1EjMQYncwk-H?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Target: 5-6 additional kickoffs for August, including Udemy and potentially Roar](https://fathom.video/share/MsHfUaZMzxvajpg2N1tq1EjMQYncwk-H?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [Alice (EA) available to assist Tyler with research and scheduling if needed](https://fathom.video/share/MsHfUaZMzxvajpg2N1tq1EjMQYncwk-H?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)

## Topics

### HubSpot Integration Progress

  - [Joe's walkthrough was thorough, no major concerns](https://fathom.video/share/MsHfUaZMzxvajpg2N1tq1EjMQYncwk-H?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)
  - [Pre-call prompt auto-population from HubSpot fields to be implemented by new hire](https://fathom.video/share/MsHfUaZMzxvajpg2N1tq1EjMQYncwk-H?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [Decision needed: populate into one field as a giant note or separate into different fields](https://fathom.video/share/MsHfUaZMzxvajpg2N1tq1EjMQYncwk-H?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)

### New HubSpot Expert Onboarding

  - [New hire (Kyle B.) expected to start tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/MsHfUaZMzxvajpg2N1tq1EjMQYncwk-H?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [3-day overlap with Joe for smooth transition](https://fathom.video/share/MsHfUaZMzxvajpg2N1tq1EjMQYncwk-H?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [Described as "even more of a HubSpot expert" than Joe](https://fathom.video/share/MsHfUaZMzxvajpg2N1tq1EjMQYncwk-H?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)

### Tyler's Schedule for Next Week

  - [Default can book 8am-5:30pm PST, except:](https://fathom.video/share/MsHfUaZMzxvajpg2N1tq1EjMQYncwk-H?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
      - [12-1pm PST blocked daily](https://fathom.video/share/MsHfUaZMzxvajpg2N1tq1EjMQYncwk-H?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
      - [All of Tuesday blocked](https://fathom.video/share/MsHfUaZMzxvajpg2N1tq1EjMQYncwk-H?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
      - [Monday morning blocked until 11am PST](https://fathom.video/share/MsHfUaZMzxvajpg2N1tq1EjMQYncwk-H?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [Wednesday & Thursday: available for calls from 1pm onwards](https://fathom.video/share/MsHfUaZMzxvajpg2N1tq1EjMQYncwk-H?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Flexibility to move calls out a week if needed for Marcel shadowing](https://fathom.video/share/MsHfUaZMzxvajpg2N1tq1EjMQYncwk-H?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)

  - [Roar potentially quick to close, pending new stakeholder involvement](https://fathom.video/share/MsHfUaZMzxvajpg2N1tq1EjMQYncwk-H?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
